features.evidence: 3 and nfc on both these phones but iphone has an advantage with the support for wi fi 7 which is the latest standard compared to wi fi 60 on the galaxy s24 now the a8 of course is a very powerful chip but it is also a very power efficient chip thanks to the use of a 3 nanom fabrication process we got a higher screen on time of about 7 hours and 30 minutes on the iphone 16 compared to 5 hours and 30 minutes on the samsung galaxy s24 but the point to be noted here is that we were running the s24 at 120 hz and if you drop down to 60 hz you ll get better battery life but it still won t be better than the iphone 16 think of it from this perspective if the iphone 16 gives you 24 hours of battery life in a single charge then the samsung galaxy s24 will give you about 18 to 20 hours that said the galaxy s24 offers faster wired charging of 25 wats as opposed to 20 wats on the iphone 16 the iphone 16 takes about 1 hour and 30 minutes for a full charge whereas the s24 takes about 1 hour 10 minutes on the other hand the iphone 16 now supports 25 w max safe wireless charging speeds but of course the max safe charger is 5,500 bucks so it s pretty expensive you ll have to buy a new one whereas on the s25 you sorry s24 s25 is coming later on the s24 you get a about 15 w charging speeds now one real advantage on the s24 is the fact that you get a proper 3x telephoto camera inside this compact body as opposed to the iphone which doesn t have that in fact even the pixel doesn t have it but let s take a look at the difference in picture quality between the two so you can make a judgment for yourself so the iphone s 24 map outputs mean that you generally get more details and sharper textures than the galaxy s24 but what i was shocked at was the 2x shots iphone s new fusion technology legit makes the 2x images look optical quality compared to the galaxy s24 which is much softer in comparison although when you zoom in further at 3x samsung has crisper more detailed shots because of the optical lens now colors are more vibrant and punchy on the galaxy s24 iphone s default look is a little warm but you can use one of the photographic styles to create a more neutral look now what photographic styles on the iphone are not just filters they re non destructive edits and you can do that while taking pictures and after taking pictures as well now now moving on to hdr samples the tuning in terms of details picked out from the highlight and the shadows are pretty solid on both but iphone s processing is definitely more natural looking now take a look at the tree bar which has turned red on the samsung or the overprocessed greens of the leaves samsung s got this very over hdr look as opposed to the natural look of iphone with the ultra wide camera what we noticed is that the iphone 16 captures more details and finer textures compared to the galaxy s24 this was true for the ultra wide shots taken in good lighting conditions and in low light both but the major advantage on the iphone is that the ultra wide can take awesome macro shots now thanks to the added autofocus capabilities samsung of course cannot do that but you can use the 3x to go close to the subjects on samsung despite that since the iphone has a closer focusing distance with the ultra wide i would generally prefer it for macro shots now let s talk about pictures of people and samsung skin tones are absolutely horrendous it s extremely red the iphone does it better here against a strong backlight samsung s hdr does offer better control over the highlights but it is seriously no match for iphone s details at 100 crop also take a look at shan s hair here there s a lot of purple fringing on the samsung sample which is not there on iphone now this is generally a problem that happens with multi stack processing which samsung needs to fix in the algorithm in portrait shots however samsung does a good job except for the skin tone issues i both the 2x and the 3x portraits captured by the galaxy s24 but of course the iphone is no slouch either both do take very good portraits and yes you can take 3x portraits this time around with the base iphones now samsung s video recording at 4k 60 fps with the primary camera is incredible i was very surprised because it matches up with the iphone in terms of hdr the detail retention and even the stabilization and the sound quality was better all right so right now we are recording the video samples using the iphone 16 and the galaxy s24 both are using its primary lens so right now we are recording the video samples using the iphone 16 and the galaxy s24 both are using its primary lens of course using iphone s new audio mix feature you can get better sound quality but i still think samsung does a fantastic job here i love it but all that breaks apart when you shoot videos in low light because the iphone is clearly superior here also ultra wide angle video recording quality is better on the iphone now when you shoot selfie videos at 4k 60 fps using both the phones i prefer samsung s video recording because it does better hdr now you can also shoot cinematic videos on the iphone which is called portrait video on the samsung and cinematic video on iphone is definitely better now as for the software experience i can t believe i m seeing this but samsung s oneu i6 is better than ios 18 in my opinion and the main reason for that is galaxy ai is currently available on samsung phones whereas apple intelligence is not on the iphone 16 series all right now let me tell you what i about oneui the first thing that i love about oneui and why i m stuck to the samsung ecosystem is samsung wallet it s incredible then you ve got secure folder samsung decks and the ever incredible good luck when you talk about ai features you ve got google s circle to search integrated with samsung really well and then you ve got notes assist where you can summarize and transcribe notes plus there s translator interpreter chat assist there s just a lot going on plus you ve got a bunch of ai specific photo editing features where you can erase objects you can expand the image there s a lot that s happening on galaxy ai now with ios 18 of course apple is going slightly towards android s direction because you ve got steaming now you can move the icons and widgets wherever you want to so all of that is nice now on ios 18 one of the air features that s available is called cleanup and compared to object eraser on samsung both function fairly well but when ios 18
value: average battery life talk time: 23 Hours

features.evidence: welcome to the iphone 16 versus samsung galaxy s24 battle the l classico of compact flagships let s find out which one is the l ganador or spanish for winner hi i m ashad you re watching track and tech english your destination for detailed incisive gadget reviews all right let me first show you the recipe to make an iphone 16 take an iphone 15 remove the mute switch and replace it with the action button and add a camera control button on the other side flip the back realign the cameras make it a vertical camera layout and voila i iphone 16 ready now let me tell you the recipe to make a samsung galaxy s24 just add one more camera below that vertical layout jokes aside both these phones have a glass sandwich design where you get glass on the front and the back and a metal frame as well and the metal used for the frame on both these phones is aluminium and on samsung you ve got a glossy finish where on iphone you ve got a matte finish which is what i prefer also i do the fact that you get so many different fantastic color options on the iphone compared to the galaxy s24 which is nice now both are really compact phones with very good inhand feel as well now to find out the differences between the two would be pedantic because it really doesn t make a difference in daily usage i m holding both the phones in my hands and yeah both are good and since these are flagships you get ip68 rating as well but samsung does have an advantage is that the type c port at the bottom is a usb gen 3
value: rear facing camera photo sensor resolution: 50 MP

features.evidence: welcome to the iphone 16 versus samsung galaxy s24 battle the l classico of compact flagships let s find out which one is the l ganador or spanish for winner hi i m ashad you re watching track and tech english your destination for detailed incisive gadget reviews all right let me first show you the recipe to make an iphone 16 take an iphone 15 remove the mute switch and replace it with the action button and add a camera control button on the other side flip the back realign the cameras make it a vertical camera layout and voila i iphone 16 ready now let me tell you the recipe to make a samsung galaxy s24 just add one more camera below that vertical layout jokes aside both these phones have a glass sandwich design where you get glass on the front and the back and a metal frame as well and the metal used for the frame on both these phones is aluminium and on samsung you ve got a glossy finish where on iphone you ve got a matte finish which is what i prefer also i do the fact that you get so many different fantastic color options on the iphone compared to the galaxy s24 which is nice now both are really compact phones with very good inhand feel as well now to find out the differences between the two would be pedantic because it really doesn t make a difference in daily usage i m holding both the phones in my hands and yeah both are good and since these are flagships you get ip68 rating as well but samsung does have an advantage is that the type c port at the bottom is a usb gen 3

0 now while both these phones do also have very tough glass for example on the iphone you get ceramic shield whereas on the s24 you get get coring g glass wicus 2 now despite apple saying that the ceramic shield used on the iphone 16 series this year is 50 better it might be better in tensile strength but not in scratch resistance because the display scratches up very easily which is not the case for the s24 take a look at it side by side and you ll know the difference and we ve been using the s24 for much longer now when we compare the displays on these phones i m convinced that samsung has a better display than apple firstly you get a larger display with better screen state than the iphone 16 primarily because you ve got slimmer bezels and just a punch hoold camera instead of a dynamic island secondly you get a proper 120 hz ltpo panel as opposed to iphone 16 s 60 hz panel and finally when we tested the iphone 16 s display against the galaxy s24 it was definitely brighter brighter not just indoors when watching hdr content but also outdoors the other thing is that on android phones you get an indisplay fingerprint scanner on the galaxy s24 it s an ultrasonic one whereas on the iphone 16 you ve got the face id although the haptic feedback we felt that the tuning was better on the iphone 16 which was tighter it had better vibrations comp to the galaxy s24 now displays one aspect of the multimedia experience but when you re talking about audio then samsung supports highest codex ldac and samsung s very own ss and ss uhq for bluetooth transmission of course this is not available on the iphone but what s better on the iphone is definitely the speaker quality take a listen to it for yourself right next to the galaxy s24 and let me know if you agree with my thoughts now next up i m going to be talking about the performance but before that if you haven t already hit the subscribe button support a channel tracker english talking about performance the iphone 16 s a18 we found it to be more powerful than the xos 2400 inside the galaxy s24 starting off with gig bench and gig bench ai iphone scored higher than samsung also when we ran the 3d mark wildlife extreme stress test on both these phones iphone had the higher loop score and it had better gp stability as well of course the difference in fps was not much which means that samsung s gpu is very very powerful in fact apple has added an aluminum sheet for better heat dissipation on the iphone 16 and therefore this definitely runs cooler than the galaxy s24 we also found the iphone 16 to be better for gaming because you can play console quality games assassin s creed mirage and resident evil village which was only possible on the pro series phones until last year now we run a real life gensin impact test where we play the game for 30 minutes at highest graphics and 60 frames per second and iphone 16 s performance was incredible we got an average of nearly 59 fps on the iphone 16 whereas the s24 managed about 4748 it s not the xos 2400 gpu is not capable it s just that samsung is throttling the performance now that my friends is evident from the fact that the xos 2400 supports rate racing in fact even the a18 does and when we compar the solar bay test samsung scored higher than the iphone but overall when you look at it i would pick the iphone 16 over the galaxy s24 for gaming performance but when you look at daily usage the galaxy s24 is better and the main reason for that is just one thing that the samsung galaxy s24 supports 120 hz refresh rate on the display and therefore it s smooth it s fast it s just better now both these phones also have capable modems therefore you get support for 5g bands etl and geo worked absolutely fine mobile data works very well calls sound really rich and crisp now you also do get support for bluetooth 5
value: display pixel density: 416 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)
